hero.title: The Last Drop
hero.subtitle: Decides Everything
hero.description: By 2030, 50% of humanity will face water stress. VODeco is the decentralized infrastructure transforming water from a depleting resource into a sustainable digital economy.

crisis.label: THE CRISIS
crisis.title: Water is Running Out
crisis.description: Traditional centralized systems have failed. Corruption, opacity, and inefficiency plague water management. The solution isn't more bureaucracy—it's decentralized autonomous infrastructure owned by the people.
crisis.quote: Water is the new oil. But unlike oil, we have no alternative.

productive.title: Productive Only

what.a: VODeco is a decentralized physical infrastructure network (DePIN) for water resource management. It combines IoT sensors, blockchain verification, and tokenized incentives to create a global water monitoring and management ecosystem.

staking.a: When you stake VOD tokens, you secure the network and fund water monitoring infrastructure. In return, you receive staking yields (8-25% APY) based on lock duration and amount. Staked tokens also grant governance rights in the DAO.

backed.a: Each VOD token represents one cubic meter of verified water data. The token's value is algorithmically tied to the Water Index (W_m³), which calculates real costs of water extraction, treatment, and scarcity. This prevents speculation and ensures fundamental value.

projects.a: 25% of VOD emissions go to the R&D Treasury. Token holders vote on which projects receive funding through the DAO. Projects receive VODCoin (development credits) and convert to VOD tokens upon successful delivery.

validators.q: How do I become a validator?
validators.a: Stake 100,000 VOD minimum to run a validation node. Validators verify water data from IoT devices, ensure data quality, and earn fees from the network. Hardware requirements: reliable internet, 99%+ uptime commitment.

cta.title: Join the Water Revolution
cta.subtitle: Stake VOD. Fund Infrastructure. Secure the Future.

footer.tagline: Decentralized Water Infrastructure for a Thriving Planet
